affinity.description:
If specified, the pod's scheduling constraints
More info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/reference/generated/kubernetes-api/v1.30/#affinity-v1-core
Type: object
Mandatory: no
Default: not set

annotations.description: Annotations is an unstructured key value map stored with a resource that may be set by external tools to store and retrieve arbitrary metadata. They are not queryable and should be preserved when modifying objects. More info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/user-guide/annotations

containerSecurityContext.description:
Security Context for a container.
Type: object
Mandatory: no

runAsUser.description:
The UID to run the entrypoint of the container process.
Type: integer
Mandatory: no

fsGroup.description:
A special supplemental group that applies to all containers in a pod.
Type: integer
Mandatory: no

defaults.description: Metric shows version collected from configmaps

extraArgs.description:
Additional arguments for version-exporter container.
Type: list[string]
Mandatory: no
Default: []

extraVarsSecret.description:
Allows set extra system environment variables for Version-exporter into the Secret.
Type: object
Mandatory: no
Default: {}

grafanaDashboard.description:
Allows creating Grafana dashboard for version-exporter
Type: boolean
Mandatory: no
Default: true

image.description: Image to use for version-exporter deployment

imagePullPolicy.description: Image pull policy to use for version-exporter deployment

install.description:
Allow to enable or disable deploy version-exporter.
Type: boolean
Mandatory: no
Default: false

labels.description: Map of string keys and values that can be used to organize and categorize (scope and select) objects. May match selectors of replication controllers and services. More info: https://kubernetes.io/docs/user-guide/labels

name.description:
# A name of a microservice to deploy with.
This name will be used as name of the microservice deployment and in labels.

nodeSelector.description:
# Allow define which Nodes the Pods are scheduled on.
Type: map[string]
Mandatory: no
Default: not set

priorityClassName.description:
Priority class name for version-exporter pods.
Type: string
Mandatory: no
Default: not set

replicas.description:
Number of created pods.
Type: integer
Mandatory: no
Default: 1

resources.description:
The resources describe compute resource requests and limits for single container.
 Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/user-guide/compute-resources/
Type: object
Mandatory: no

limits.description:
Defines maximum amount of compute resources allowed.
 Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/user-guide/compute-resources/
Type: object
Mandatory: no

cpu.description:
CPU limit for version-exporter container.
Type: string
Mandatory: no

memory.description:
Memory limit for version-exporter container.
Type: string
Mandatory: no

requests.description:
Defines minimum amount of compute resources required.
 Ref: https://kubernetes.io/docs/user-guide/compute-resources/
Type: object
Mandatory: no

cpu.description:
CPU request for version-exporter container.
Type: string
Mandatory: no

memory.description:
Memory request for version-exporter container.
Type: string
Mandatory: no

secretName.description:
# A name of a microservice secret to deploy with.
This name will be used as name of the microservice secret deployment.

annotations.description:
Annotations set which will create in service
Type: map[string]string
Mandatory: no
Default: {}

labels.description:
Labels set which will create in service
Type: map[string]string
Mandatory: no
Default: {}

port.description:
Port of version-exporter which use in service
Type: int
Mandatory: no
Default: 9100

portName.description:
Port name of version-exporter which use in service
Type: string
Mandatory: no
Default: http

type.description:
Type of version-exporter service
Type: string
Mandatory: no
Default: ClusterIP

service.description:
Service configuration for version-exporter
Type: object
Mandatory: no

annotations.description: Annotations to add to the service account

create.description: Specifies whether a service account should be created

labels.description: Labels to add to the service account

name.description:
The name of the service account to use.
If not set and create is true, a name is generated using the fullname template

enabled.description:
If true, a ServiceMonitor is created for a `version-exporter`.
Type: boolean
Mandatory: no
Default: true

interval.description:
Scraping interval for Prometheus.
Type: string
Mandatory: no
Default: 5m

scrapeTimeout.description: Please note that scrapeTimeout must be less than the interval

tolerations.description:
# Tolerations allow the pods to schedule onto nodes with matching taints.
Type: object
Mandatory: no
